headline: New Owner of AIM Mail Center in Rocklin, California Continues 24-Year Legacy Serving the Community with Shipping and Office Services
summary: Annex Brands, Inc., a leading franchisor in the packing, shipping, and office services industries, is pleased to announce the successful transfer of ownership of an existing AIM Mail Center location in Rocklin, CA to new owner and experienced operator, Kristina Paransun. This is Kristina's second location and this transition to new ownership ensures that the community will benefit from the essential shipping and office services provided by this AIM Mail Center for the last 24 years.
